basic_details.job_title: NIT Raipur Project Assistant Recruitment 2026 - Walkin
basic_details.organization_name: National Institute of Technology Raipur (NIT Raipur)
basic_details.short_information: National Institute of Technology Raipur (NIT Raipur) Project Assistant Notification 2026 has been released on 08 May 2026 on the official website of National Institute of Technology Raipur . A total of 1 vacancy has been announced through the NIT Raipur Project Assistant Recruitment 2026.

qualification.details: B.Tech./B.E. degree in CSE/IT/Data Science/AI/ML or any other relevant branch or B.E./B.Tech. and M.E./M.Tech. in Computer Sc. & Engg./Information Technology/EE/ETE/Data Science/AI/ML or any other relevant branch or MCA/MSc (Computer Science/IT) equivalent from an Institute of National Importance/AICTE-approved University/Institution with minimum 65% marks or 7.0 CGPA (out of 10). Desirable: strong knowledge in Machine Learning, Deep Learning, Web technologies and Python.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to attend the walk-in interview for NIT Raipur Project Assistant recruitment?
faq.answer: The walk-in interview for the Project Assistant position at NIT Raipur is scheduled for 28 May 2026. Candidates should ensure they arrive at the venue on this date.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for the Project Assistant post?
faq.answer: Candidates need a B.Tech./B.E. in CSE/IT/Data Science/AI/ML or equivalent, or M.E./M.Tech. in relevant fields, or MCA/M.Sc. (Computer Science/IT) with a minimum of 65% marks or 7.0 CGPA.

faq.question: Q3. What is the salary offered for the Project Assistant position?
faq.answer: The selected candidate will receive a consolidated salary of Rs. 20,000/- Per Month.

faq.question: Q4. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q5. What is the mode of application for NIT Raipur Project Assistant jobs?
faq.answer: The application mode is Walk-in. Candidates need to attend the interview directly at the specified venue and time.

faq.question: Q6. Where is the walk-in interview for NIT Raipur Project Assistant to be held?
faq.answer: The walk-in interview will be held at National Institute of Technology Raipur, Chhattisgarh, Raipur - 492010.

faq.question: Q7. What documents should candidates carry for the walk-in interview?
faq.answer: Candidates must carry all original documents, self-attested photocopies of educational certificates, ID proof, and passport-size photographs.

faq.question: Q8. Is there any age limit for the Project Assistant post?
faq.answer: The official notification does not specify an age limit. Candidates are advised to check the detailed notification for any specific age criteria.

faq.question: Q9. What is the total number of vacancies for the Project Assistant post?
faq.answer: There is one vacancy for the post of Project Assistant announced by NIT Raipur.

faq.question: Q10. What is the job type for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The job type for this recruitment is Contractual.
